feat.name: Cat Nap
feat.text: You can regain your energy quickly with a brief nap. You sleep for 10 minutes, after which you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for 1 hour.

traits.name: Catfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the catfolk ancestry. Catfolk are humanoids with feline features. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by catfolk. An item with this trait is created and used by catfolk.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Exploration
traits.text: An activity with this trait takes more than a turn to use, and can usually be used only during exploration mode.
